security.csp: default-src 'self' customprotocol: asset:; img-src 'self' data: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' https://www.googletagmanager.com; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://www.google-analytics.com https://region1.google-analytics.com

bundle.shortDescription: A beautiful, local-first disk space explorer
bundle.longDescription: Scan drives and folders, explore disk usage, find duplicate files, and benchmark storage without uploading your data.
